name: validate-source-file: --check-registry-link verifies source.id maps to an entry in the referenced registry
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml#src-1
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - id: g-x-001
    name: x
    description: x
    detector: x
    type: problem
    fixable: null
    has_suggestions: false
    deprecated: false
    replaced_by: []
    docs_url: https://a.com
    requires_type_checking: false
    recommended: true
    severity: P1
    version: 1.0.0
    semver: 1.0.0
    rule_state: warn-only
    provenance: [{source: x, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://a.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]
recommended_set: [g-x-001]
all_set: [g-x-001]
' > file.yaml

printf 'src-other:
  publisher: B
  url: https://b.com
  license: MIT
  last_verified: 2026-05-04
' > STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
